programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: An upstate New York couple is locked out of their own home by squatters who complain about a mouse infestation — but still refuse to leave; when the occupants allegedly forge a lease, the dispute escalates from a property battle to a potential criminal claim; but Flash and his team have one mission: reclaim the home for its rightful owners.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, three sisters call on Flash after squatters take over their late grandfather's property; the house has been transformed into a hoarder's den, the backyard into a full-blown junkyard, and squatters seem to appear at every turn; to take back the home, Flash sets his sights on the ringleader, hoping the rest will finally fall in line.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Victor hopes to hit the jackpot with some video poker machines; Lesa buys a contractor's unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The Doc and the Junkster get desperate on the final day in Austin; Moe and Mary bid on a locker full of piñatas; Jenny seeks furniture, but obtains a new set of wheels instead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bargain hunters roll into Tustin, Calif., fellow bidders make things difficult for Jarrod and Brandi; Jeff makes record profit on a low-price locker; Barry and Kenny try to sideswipe Dave.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave hopes to score top-quality merchandise when the auction action shifts to Koreatown; Mary's locker comes with a high price; Brandi becomes annoyed with Jarrod's antics.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers invade Rene's home turf of Oceanside, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon fight for a locker containing a piece of cinematic history; friendship is both magic and profitable for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod discover an illuminating stash; Dave does what he does best; Mary finally gets the help she needs.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers visit Orange, Calif.; Ivy Calvin finds collectibles in the garbage; Jarrod and Brandi hope to earn a profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders roll into La Habra, Calif.; Darrell squares off against a former professional fighter; Jarrod and Brandi meet a nerd; Barry relaxes with a famous golfing friend.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A license check spirals when a suspect refuses to surrender; in Louisiana, a fugitive vanishes into thin air; a Georgia traffic stop almost costs a deputy his life, and a plane crash sends deputies deep into the swamp to rescue a father and daughter.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A K9 unit tracks a copper thief through punishing wetlands; a deputy gets a lucky escape after a gunman triggers a tense standoff; a suspect tries to make a watery getaway, and a dramatic car chase in Georgia leads to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A car thief flees arrest, sparking a two-day manhunt; a drone helps a rookie K9 make his first arrest, while in Florida, two suspects take to the water in a bid to escape justice and in Louisiana, a routine traffic stop reveals a dark tragedy.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A suspect dives into open water and vanishes into the mangroves; in Texas, a chase ends in a swampy manhunt as officers call in reinforcements after suspects bail and disappear into the swampland; an armed arson suspect sparks an 11-hour standoff... high up in a tree.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked woman is arrested for stealing a sheriff's pickup truck; a gym goer loses his cool and his clothing; and a golf pro spectator streaks into the spotlight.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads to one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop.

programme.desc: Oliver, who has Tourette's syndrome, hopes to bag his first ever girlfriend. Claire, who's usually surrounded by builders, wants to lay the foundations of a dream relationship.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he tried to help: the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, and Kingston Café, La Frite and Capri in California.

programme.title: The Accused: Beyond Reasonable Doubt?
programme.desc: In 2012, a hand-delivered letter accuses David Bryant of a historic sex attack. He insists he's innocent but the jury disagree. Years later, can he prove he didn't do it.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Grumblestunk's made friends with an owl, but the owl Stan spots, and the owl Stan hears are different sorts! Stan and Gran have a hoot solving this case.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Carlos and Tracker make pawpaw juice with the pups when Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta are in trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: It's a windy day and Jonathan wishes to play kite with his dad. Since Mr Brown is stuck at home, Paddington takes Jonathan to the park.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: A mole disturbs King Thistle's golf course, so a gnome is enlisted to help drive it away. Soon the gnome is ordering the elves around.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Reef and Roadie hilariously disguise themselves as babies to win an obstacle course.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig take Peppa, George and all their friends on a boat trip to Pirate Island.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Kemi tells the story of grumpy Ben who never shares his toys. So, one day, Beelinda the honeybee shrinks Ben to bee size to show him how all her buzzy buddies work together.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle investigates when a Japanese ballerina is seemingly killed by a ninja.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Investigating the death of a Wall Street trader leads Castle and Beckett to discover that the victim was an undercover informant for the U.S. Attorney's office.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: A look at the astoundingly beautiful Dinorwic Slate Quarry landscape of North-West Wales - a UNESCO World Heritage site which, in its time was the second largest in the world.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Somerset: Wonder of the West Country
programme.desc: A visit to Cheddar's famous gorge reveals how its world-renowned cheese is made - and the depths its makers go to get the flavour right! Plus, a trip to Dunster Castle.

programme.title: Tour de France 2026
programme.desc: Highlights from Stage 11 as the peloton heads from the spa town of Vichy to Nevers on a stage that could provide opportunities for sprinters and breakaway specialists. Rebecca Charlton hosts.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to help a 67-year-old HGV driver who has suffered a cardiac arrest, and, in Hillingdon, a man who has suffered severe burns after lighting a bonfire with petrol.

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programme.desc: Gary has a rare tumour in his spine. Leaving it in place will probably lead to paralysis, but an operation carries a huge risk. Margaret has developed a hole in her skull.

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Language is a barrier in dealing with an aggressive male who claims he has been attacked. Children's nurse Kiera treats an 11-year-old who stepped on glass and sliced open her foot.

programme.title: The Hospital: Life on the Line
programme.desc: A 48-year-old who thought she had Covid was actually on the brink of heart failure. Then, waiting for an urgent heart transplant, her health took a dramatic turn for the worst..

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Dr Emma helps a village hall manager to look lump-free ready for her 40th birthday party. Dr Natalia digs out a cyst to give her patient a smooth back for a holiday to Egypt.
